basic_details.job_title: OSSSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 5,989 Posts
basic_details.department: Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Sub-Ordinate Staff Selection Commission (OSSSC) has released a short advertisement for the recruitment of 5,989 Nursing Officer posts under the Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Odisha. The vacancies will be filled in various district cadre establishments across all 30 districts of Odisha. Interested and eligible candidates can submit their applications online through the OSSSC official website from 13 June 2026.

important_dates.raw: Short Advertisement Released: 11-06-2026 Online Registration/Re-registration Start Date: 13-06-2026 Last Date for Registration/Re-registration: 06-07-2026 Submission of Online Application Start Date: 13-06-2026 Last Date for Submission of Online Application: 13-07-2026

qualification.education_qualification: GNM / B.Sc Nursing (Expected - Refer Detailed Notification)

selection_process: Written Examination Merit List Preparation Document Verification Medical Examination (if applicable)
how_to_apply: Log in using the registered credentials.
Fill in the online application form carefully.
Review all details before final submission.
Submit the application form and keep a printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available under OSSSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 5,989 Nursing Officer vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q2. Which organization has released this recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The Odisha Sub-Ordinate Staff Selection Commission (OSSSC) has released the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the post name announced by OSSSC?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Nursing Officer posts.

faq.question: Q4. When will the online registration begin?
faq.answer: The registration process will start on 13 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date for registration?
faq.answer: The last date for registration/re-registration is 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to submit the online application?
faq.answer: Candidates can submit their applications until 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What qualification is expected for Nursing Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates with GNM or B.Sc Nursing qualifications are expected to be eligible.
